asset_subtypes.name: Mobile Equipment
asset_subtypes.description: Mobile equipment not classified as road vehicles.

asset_subtypes.name: Shop Equipment
asset_subtypes.description: Fixed or semi-fixed equipment used in shops and service facilities.

asset_subtypes.name: Tools
asset_subtypes.description: Hand tools, power tools, and calibrated tools.

asset_subtypes.name: Safety Assets
asset_subtypes.description: Safety equipment and PPE that requires inspection, tracking, and replacement.

asset_subtypes.name: Facilities
asset_subtypes.description: Building systems and infrastructure that require inspections and maintenance.

asset_subtypes.name: Containers
asset_subtypes.description: Tanks, totes, dumpsters, and other containers requiring inspection and maintenance.

asset_subtypes.name: Pickup Truck
asset_subtypes.description: Light-duty pickup used for service or support.

asset_subtypes.name: Land Parcel
asset_subtypes.description: A parcel of land tracked as an asset.

asset_subtypes.name: Building
asset_subtypes.description: A building tracked as an asset.

asset_subtypes.name: Suite / Unit
asset_subtypes.description: A rentable suite/unit within a building.

asset_subtypes.name: Yard / Lot
asset_subtypes.description: A yard/lot area tracked as an asset.
